# hrobot_storageboxes (Data Source)

List all Hetzner Storage Boxes on the account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All Storage Boxes on the account.
data "hrobot_storageboxes" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `storageboxes` (Attributes List) All Storage Boxes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--storageboxes))

<a id="nestedatt--storageboxes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storageboxes`

Read-Only:

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the Storage Box is cancelled.
- `disk_quota` (Number) Total disk quota (MB).
- `disk_usage` (Number) Total disk usage (MB).
- `disk_usage_data` (Number) Disk usage by data (MB).
- `disk_usage_snapshots` (Number) Disk usage by snapshots (MB).
- `external_reachability` (Boolean) Whether the box is reachable from outside the Hetzner network.
- `host_system` (String) Host system identifier.
- `id` (Number) Storage Box ID.
- `linked_server` (Number) Number of the linked server (0 if none).
- `location` (String) Datacenter location.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the Storage Box is locked.
- `login` (String) Login/username of the Storage Box.
- `name` (String) Storage Box name.
- `paid_until` (String) Paid-until date.
- `product` (String) Product name (e.g. BX11).
- `samba` (Boolean) Whether Samba/CIFS is enabled.
- `server` (String) Hostname clients connect to.
- `ssh` (Boolean) Whether SSH is enabled.
- `webdav` (Boolean) Whether WebDAV is enabled.
- `zfs` (Boolean) Whether ZFS snapshot directory access is enabled.
